title: Vaithya lingam temple
tagline: Vaithya lingam temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sri Vaithya Lingam Swami temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Sri Vaithya Lingam Swami and Goddess Yogambigai.
overview.description: Sri Vaithya Lingam Swami temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Sri Vaithya Lingam Swami and Goddess Yogambigai. It is located at Aladipatti, Nallur in Tenkasi district of Tamil Nadu.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nallur, Tirunelveli
topPlaces.description: Nallur is a panchayat town in Tenkasi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in a municipality under Aalangulam Panchayat Union .

topPlaces.name: Sivalarkulam
topPlaces.description: Sivalarkulam is a village in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Alangulam, Tenkasi
topPlaces.description: Alangulam is a town in Tenkasi district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is a Special Grade Town Panchayat and the centre of the Alangulam Taluk in Tenkasi district.

topPlaces.name: Alangulam taluk
topPlaces.description: Alangulam taluk is a taluk of Tenkasi district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the town of Alangulam.

topPlaces.name: Kidarakulam
topPlaces.description: Kidarakulam is a village in the Tenkasi district, Tamil Nadu, India. As of the 2001 census, Kidarakulam had a population of around 2,009 as per the 2001 census.

topPlaces.name: Kalathimadam
topPlaces.description: Kalathimadam is a village near Alangulam in Tenkasi district of Tamil Nadu, India.The Village derives its name from the Kalathivinayagar Temple which is located in the Village.The Village is located at a distance of about 1.7 km from the Alangulam. The village is well connected to alangulam through Mini bus service.

topPlaces.name: Karumbanoor
topPlaces.description: Karumbanoor is a village/hamlet in Alangulam Taluk in Tenkasi District of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It comes under Andipatti Panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Kadanganeri
topPlaces.description: Kadanganeri is a village located at Alangulam Taluk in Tenkasi district of Tamil Nadu, India. Kadanganeri is a Village Panchayat comes under Alangulam block.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vaithya lingam temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vaithya lingam temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vaithya lingam temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (79 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (75 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vaithya lingam temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vaithya lingam temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vaithya lingam temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vaithya lingam temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vaithya lingam temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nallur, Tirunelveli, Sivalarkulam, Alangulam, Tenkasi, Alangulam taluk, Kidarakulam.
